summary: I doubt pip or other frontends will adopt the new API, so I see little reason to standardise it; demand for non‑standard targets seems low, though I may not be aware of all use cases.
important_uncertainty: I don't see a good reason for standardising anything

phrase_candidates.text: I don't know if that's the case
